title: Prospective Q2.5 seed-2 diagnostic
body: Run only seed 2 from merged Zero commit 616220e2b7a35bb35f34b01fb32e1f5d8977df89. Preserve Q2.4's corpora, immutable teachers, quantity gates, 1.5% commit authority, 2% public replay ceiling, 25-commit recovery cadence, 100-commit public cadence, 1000 acquisition and 400 consolidation outer-attempt caps, eight-exhaustion fallback, sealed promotion rule, and seed-1/3 replication lock. Resolve go only after public and promotion gates; otherwise resolve no_go as valid evidence.
claims: No Q2.5 training result is observed before the contract, forecasts, and funding commitments are recorded.
A valid no-go is terminal evidence and does not authorize threshold tuning or sealed-seed access.
